movie.actors: Johnny Weissmuller, Neil Hamilton, C. Aubrey Smith, Maureen O'Sullivan
movie.plot: A trader and his daughter set off in search of the fabled graveyard of the elephants in deepest Africa, only to encounter a wild man raised by apes.
movie.title: Tarzan the Ape Man
movie.writer: Edgar Rice Burroughs (based upon the characters created by), Cyril Hume (adaptation), Ivor Novello (dialogue)
